procedures.name: Standard LASIK
procedures.tagline: Affordable bladeless laser vision correction — proven & trusted
procedures.usp: Budget-friendly LASIK with proven excimer laser technology for clear vision
procedures.description: Standard LASIK is the most affordable entry point to laser vision correction. Using a proven excimer laser platform, it corrects myopia, hyperopia, and astigmatism with a quick, painless procedure. Ideal for patients seeking freedom from glasses at the most accessible price point.

procedures.name: WaveLight Plus InnovEyes
procedures.tagline: AI-guided 400 Hz — 1,050 eye-tracking points per second
procedures.usp: PerfectPulse Technology® tracks eye 1,050 times/sec for sub-micron precision
procedures.technology: WaveLight Refractive Suite with InnovEyes + PerfectPulse Technology®
procedures.description: WaveLight Plus InnovEyes by Alcon is the most advanced flap-based refractive laser system. Its proprietary PerfectPulse Technology® tracks eye position 1,050 times per second, ensuring every laser pulse lands with sub-micron accuracy at 400 Hz speed.

procedures.name: HD Contoura Vision
procedures.technology: Wavelight EX500 Excimer Laser + Topolyzer Vario
procedures.description: Contoura Vision uses advanced topographic mapping to create a personalized treatment plan based on 22,000 unique elevation points on your cornea. This allows for corrections beyond just your spectacle prescription, addressing microscopic irregularities for potentially sharper-than-6/6 vision.

procedures.name: EPI LASIK
procedures.tagline: Non-detectable laser vision correction — no flap, no cut
procedures.usp: Surface ablation technique — cornea remains untouched structurally, ideal for thin corneas
procedures.description: EPI LASIK is a non-detectable, flapless surface ablation procedure. Unlike traditional LASIK, it does not cut into the corneal stroma — making it structurally the safest option. The epithelial sheet is gently separated and repositioned after laser reshaping. Ideal for thin corneas, contact sports athletes, and armed forces candidates.

procedures.name: SiLK
procedures.tagline: Premium lenticule — ultra-smooth stromal bed, best night vision
procedures.usp: Next-gen lenticule tech with sub-2mm incision and ultra-smooth stromal bed
procedures.technology: Johnson & Johnson elita Platform with SiLK Technology
procedures.description: SiLK (Smooth Incision Lenticule Keratomileusis) is the latest evolution in flapless lenticule surgery, featuring a sub-2mm incision and an ultra-smooth stromal bed. Clinical evidence indicates superior night vision and more predictable outcomes.

procedures.name: SMILE Pro
procedures.tagline: Flapless lenticule — 2mm incision, minimal dry eye
procedures.usp: No flap, no blade — 2mm micro-incision only, fastest recovery
procedures.description: SMILE Pro is a flapless lenticule-based surgery. Instead of creating a corneal flap, the femtosecond laser cuts a disc of corneal tissue which is removed through a tiny 2mm incision. Preserves more corneal strength with significantly less dry eye.

centres.name: Centre for Lasik - Lajpat Nagar
centres.address: E-33, Lajpat Nagar Part 2, New Delhi 110024

testimonials.name: Keshav S.
testimonials.text: More than fully satisfied with the excellent service and special discount on LASIK surgery. Thanks to the whole team for amazing support.

testimonials.name: Sania G.
testimonials.text: Had budget constraints and high eye power. The team made thin flap SBK LASIK possible within my budget with great support throughout.

testimonials.name: Habib M.
testimonials.text: Just wonderful to see clear and sharp without glasses. The whole journey was so smooth with the right information and best possible discount.

testimonials.name: Pooja M.
testimonials.text: Used contact lenses for more than 8 years. The right guidance about latest technology helped me finally get rid of glasses at discounted rates.

testimonials.name: Raj K.
testimonials.text: Was nervous about surgery but the team explained everything clearly. Contoura Vision gave me better than 6/6 vision. Life-changing experience!

testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.text: Got SMILE Pro done and the laser was over in 7 seconds! I was back at work in 2 days. The team at Centre for Lasik is incredibly professional.

faqs.q: What is WaveLight Plus InnovEyes LASIK?
faqs.a: WaveLight Plus InnovEyes by Alcon is the most advanced flap-based refractive laser platform. Its PerfectPulse Technology® tracks your eye position 1,050 times per second, ensuring every laser pulse lands with sub-micron accuracy at 400 Hz speed.

faqs.q: What is SMILE Pro eye surgery?
faqs.a: SMILE Pro is a flapless lenticule-based procedure — the laser creates a disc of corneal tissue inside the eye, which is removed through a 2mm incision. No corneal flap, no blade. Cost: ₹65,000/eye.
SiLK is the latest evolution of flapless lenticule surgery using an ultra-smooth stromal bed through a sub-2mm incision. Cost: ₹75,000/eye.
EPI LASIK is a non-detectable surface ablation procedure where the epithelial layer is gently separated instead of cutting a flap. Safest for thin corneas and armed forces candidates.
HD Contoura Vision uses 22,000-point topographic mapping to create a fully personalized ablation profile. Over 30% of patients achieve better-than-6/6 vision.

faqs.q: What is the difference between LASIK and SMILE Pro / SiLK?
faqs.a: LASIK creates a corneal flap. SMILE Pro and SiLK are flapless — a lenticule is extracted through a tiny incision. Lower dry eye risk and better corneal stability.

faqs.q: Which LASIK technology is best for me in 2026?
faqs.a: Active lifestyle/thin corneas: SMILE Pro or SiLK. Corneal irregularities: HD Contoura Vision. AI-guided: WaveLight InnovEyes. Armed forces: EPI LASIK.
No. Anaesthetic eye drops are applied. You feel zero pain — most describe a mild pressure lasting a few seconds.
LASIK permanently reshapes the cornea. Over 95% of patients maintain stable vision for decades. Presbyopia after 40-45 is unrelated.
Yes. All six technologies offered are approved by the US FDA and Indian regulatory authorities.
Most adults aged 18+ with stable prescription (12 months). Corrects myopia -0.5D to -12D, hyperopia +0.5D to +6D, astigmatism up to 6D. Min corneal thickness ~480μ.

faqs.q: Can I get LASIK if I have dry eyes?
faqs.a: Mild dry eye can be managed. SMILE Pro and SiLK preserve more corneal nerves. Severe dry eye may be a contraindication.

faqs.q: How much does LASIK cost in India?
faqs.a: Standard LASIK ₹8,999/eye, EPI LASIK ₹18,000/eye, Contoura Vision ₹25,500/eye, InnovEyes ₹49,000/eye, SMILE Pro ₹65,000/eye, SiLK ₹75,000/eye. EMI from ₹1,500/month.
Yes, EMI from ₹1,500/month through major banks. No-cost EMI on select cards.
Absolutely none. Price includes diagnostics, surgery, medications, and follow-ups.

faqs.q: What is the recovery time after LASIK?
faqs.a: Day 1: 80-90% clear. Day 2-3: Return to work. Day 7: Drive. Month 1-3: Full stabilization.
No rubbing eyes 4 weeks. Protective glasses for sleeping 1 week. Prescribed drops. No swimming 2 weeks. Limit screens 2-3 days.

faqs.q: Is LASIK eligible for armed forces?
faqs.a: Yes. EPI LASIK is preferred — no detectable flap. Must be done 6-12 months before medical examination.

faqs.q: Which LASIK is best for NDA/CDS/SSB?
faqs.a: EPI LASIK — surface ablation with no corneal flap, undetectable during medical examination.

innovEyes.study: FDA PMA Approval (WaveLight EX500 + InnovEyes Sightmap)

innovEyes.keyOutcomes: UDVA better in InnovEyes group, 48% ≥20/12.5 vision
